mano_cua.result_summary: 图标叠加bug确认：播放按钮显示文字'play'而非图标，音量按钮🔊和×同时叠加显示。5次刷新100%复现。非短暂闪烁而是持续存在的状态管理缺陷。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Play button shows text 'play' instead of icon, mute button shows overlapping 🔊× icons. Bug is persistent across all 5 refreshes, not a transient flash. Icon state management fundamentally broken.
